title: Difference From Previous Order
description: Calculate the difference in order amount between each order and the previous order for the same customer.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, date, diff FROM (SELECT customer_id, date, amount - LAG(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY date) diff FROM orders) WHERE diff IS NOT NULL;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

difference_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(to_date(col("date")))

result = (
    orders.withColumn("prev_amount", lag("amount").over(difference_window))
    .withColumn("diff", col("amount") - col("prev_amount"))
    .filter(col("diff").isNotNull())
    .select("customer_id", "date", "diff")
)
